name: Wilted Waldorf Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 Large tart apple, cored and cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-12 inch frying pan over medium heat, stir nuts until lightly browned, stirring occasionally for about 8-10 minutes. Remove the nuts from the pan and set aside.
2. In a bowl, mix together 1/4 cup vinegar and sugar. Core the apple and add the apple cubes to the vinegar mixture. Stir to combine.
3. Add oil, onion, garlic, and caraway seed to the frying pan. Stir over high heat until the onion is soft and translucent, about 4-5 minutes. Add cabbage and the remaining 2 tablespoons vinegar. Stir until the cabbage just begins to wilt, approximately 2 minutes. Pour the mixture into a shallow bowl.
4. Top with the apple mixture and nuts; gently mix everything together. Add salt to taste.
